is_face_droopy.speak_before: Please frame the patient's face clearly and hold still for a moment, then tell me when to run the face check.
is_face_droopy.agent_hint: Wait for a clear face view, then run the facial droop check and explain whether the result looks suspicious or unclear.
is_face_droopy.tool_prompt: Analyze the latest frame for facial asymmetry or droop consistent with a stroke FAST check. Return whether the face appears symmetric, drooping, or unclear.
is_face_droopy.advance_when: the facial droop tool returns a result or the agent explains that the face view is unclear and asks for a retry

raise_hands_check.speak_before: Ask the patient to raise both arms straight out in front of them, keep the camera on both arms, then tell me when to run the arm check.
raise_hands_check.agent_hint: Use pose context and the live scene to judge arm symmetry, then say whether one side looks lower or unclear.
raise_hands_check.tool_prompt: Assess whether the patient has raised both arms evenly or whether one arm stays lower, drifts downward, or cannot be lifted. Return a structured assessment with confidence and uncertainty.
raise_hands_check.advance_when: the agent reports whether the arm raise looks symmetric, asymmetric, or unclear

is_speech_slurred.speak_before: Ask the patient to repeat a simple phrase, then decide whether the speech sounds slurred, unusual, or normal.
is_speech_slurred.agent_hint: Keep this short. Accept a simple yes, no, slurred, normal, or unclear answer from the wearer.
is_speech_slurred.advance_when: the wearer confirms whether speech sounded normal, slurred, or unclear
